lines.speaker: Barista
lines.text: Good morning! What can I get you?

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: A large coffee, please. And do you have any pastries?

lines.speaker: Barista
lines.text: We have croissants and muffins today.

lines.speaker: Customer
lines.text: I'll take a croissant. How much is that?

questions.question: How much does the customer pay?
